title: rosa × waitziana var. aunieri
intro: Rosa × waitziana var. aunieri, also known as the Wild Rose or Auneri's Rose, is a plant species that is a variety of the hybrid rose Rosa × waitziana, a cross between Rosa bracteata and Rosa rubiginosa. The medicinal properties of Rosa × waitziana var. aunieri include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, among others. Rosa × waitziana var. aunieri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
